subtopics: Need for measurement, Units of measurement, Systems of units
key_concepts: SI units (fundamental and derived), Significant figures, Uncertainty in result, Dimensions of physical quantities, Dimensional analysis and applications

subtopics: Frame of reference, Motion description using differentiation and integration
key_concepts: Uniform and non-uniform motion, Average speed/velocity, Instantaneous velocity, Uniformly accelerated motion, Velocity-time and position-time graphs, Relations for uniformly accelerated motion (graphical/calculus)

subtopics: Vector quantities and operations, Motion types in plane
key_concepts: Scalar/Vector quantities, Position/displacement vectors, Vector addition/subtraction/multiplication, Rectangular components, Scalar and Vector products, Projectile motion, Uniform circular motion

subtopics: Newton's Laws, Momentum and Impulse, Friction
key_concepts: Force, Inertia, Newton's 1st/2nd/3rd laws, Conservation of linear momentum, Equilibrium of concurrent forces, Static/Kinetic/Rolling friction, Lubrication, Centripetal force (circular motion examples)

subtopics: Work done by forces, Energy forms, Collisions
key_concepts: Work (constant/variable force), Kinetic energy, Work-energy theorem, Power, Potential energy (spring), Conservative and non-conservative forces, Motion in vertical circle, Elastic and Inelastic collisions

chapters.source_chapter_name: System of Particles and Rotational Motion
subtopics: Center of mass, Torque and Angular momentum, Rigid body rotation
key_concepts: CM of particle system/rigid body/rod, Conservation of CM motion, Moment of force (Torque), Angular momentum and conservation, Equilibrium of rigid bodies, Rotational equations of motion, Linear vs Rotational comparison, Moment of inertia, Radius of gyration

subtopics: Planetary motion, Universal gravitation, Gravity variations
key_concepts: Kepler's laws, Universal law of gravitation, Acceleration due to gravity (altitude/depth), Gravitational potential energy and potential, Escape speed, Orbital velocity, Energy of orbiting satellite

subtopics: Elasticity and Stress-Strain
key_concepts: Hooke's law, Young’s modulus, Bulk modulus, Shear modulus (qualitative), Poisson's ratio, Elastic energy, Applications of elastic behavior (qualitative)

subtopics: Fluid pressure and flow, Surface phenomena
key_concepts: Pressure due to fluid column, Pascal's law (hydraulic lift/brakes), Viscosity, Stokes' law, Terminal velocity, Streamline/Turbulent flow, Bernoulli's theorem (Torricelli/Dynamic lift), Surface tension and energy, Angle of contact, Excess pressure in curved surfaces

subtopics: Heat and Temperature, Heat Transfer
key_concepts: Thermal expansion (solids/liquids/gases), Anomalous expansion of water, Specific heat capacity (Cp/Cv), Calorimetry, Change of state/Latent heat, Conduction/Convection/Radiation, Thermal conductivity, Blackbody radiation concepts

subtopics: Laws of Thermodynamics, Gaseous processes
key_concepts: Thermal equilibrium/Zeroth law, Heat/Work/Internal energy, First and Second laws, State variables/EOS, Isothermal/Adiabatic/Reversible/Irreversible/Cyclic processes

subtopics: Gas behavior and molecular theory
key_concepts: Equation of state, Work done in compression, Kinetic assumptions/Pressure concept, Temperature interpretation/RMS speed, Degrees of freedom, Law of equipartition (statement), Specific heat capacities, Mean free path, Avogadro's number

subtopics: Periodic motion and SHM
key_concepts: Time period, Frequency, Displacement function, Periodic functions, Simple Harmonic Motion (S.H.M), Uniform circular motion relation to S.H.M
Wave characteristics and behavior

topics: Electric charges and Conservation of charge
subtopics: Coulomb's law, forces between multiple charges, superposition principle, continuous charge distribution
Electric field, electric field due to a point charge, electric field lines
Electric dipole, torque on a dipole in uniform electric field
key_concepts: Gauss's theorem and its applications (infinitely long straight wire, infinite plane sheet, spherical shell)

topics: Electric potential, potential difference, equipotential surfaces
subtopics: Potential due to point charge, dipole and system of charges; electrical potential energy
Conductors and insulators, free and bound charges inside a conductor
Dielectrics, electric polarization, capacitors and capacitance
Combination of capacitors in series and parallel
key_concepts: Capacitance of parallel plate capacitor with/without dielectric; energy stored in a capacitor (formulae only)

subtopics: Ohm's law, V-I characteristics (linear and non-linear)
Electrical energy, power, resistivity and conductivity; temperature dependence of resistance
Internal resistance of a cell, emf and potential difference
Combination of cells in series and parallel
key_concepts: Kirchhoff's rules, Wheatstone bridge

topics: Concept of magnetic field, Oersted's experiment
subtopics: Biot-Savart law (current carrying circular loop), Ampere's law (infinitely long straight wire)
Straight solenoid (qualitative treatment)
key_concepts: Force on moving charge and current-carrying conductor; force between parallel conductors
Torque on current loop, magnetic dipole moment, Current loop as a magnetic dipole
Bar magnet as an equivalent solenoid (qualitative treatment only)
Electromagnetic Induction
Alternating Current
Electromagnetic Waves
